description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized SUV with a sleek, aerodynamic body finished in a dark metallic gray color. The vehicle features a prominent front grille, aggressive headlights, and a sculpted hood, giving it a sporty and upscale appearance. The side profile reveals four doors, flush door handles, and blacked-out window trim, complemented by large, multi-spoke black alloy wheels. The roof is solid black, contrasting with the body, and the rear includes a subtle spoiler, wraparound taillights, and a robust bumper. The windows are heavily tinted, and the overall design suggests a luxury urban SUV, likely equipped with advanced features and a spacious interior. The vehicle's proportions and styling cues are reminiscent of high-end brands, suitable for city driving and suburban environments.
description: A sleek, dark metallic gray luxury SUV with blacked-out trim, large alloy wheels, and a sporty, upscale design. Features include a prominent grille, sculpted body, and tinted windows.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bold grille, aggressive headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, flush handles, blacked-out trim, and large black alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays wraparound taillights, a subtle spoiler, and a robust bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same door and wheel features.
attribute_wheel_design: large black alloy wheels with multi-spoke design
